name: Security Gate — Helm
description: Pre-write security checks for Helm chart templates and values

then.prompt: Before writing this file, check for: 1) Privileged containers (privileged: true, hostNetwork: true, hostPID: true). 2) Missing security context (runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, allowPrivilegeEscalation). 3) Hardcoded secrets in values or templates (credentials, tokens, passwords). 4) Missing resource limits (CPU/memory not defined). 5) Latest image tag in production values. 6) Wildcard RBAC permissions (verbs: ['*'] or resources: ['*']). If issues found, DENY the write and explain what needs to be fixed.
